metadata.purpose: Seed whitelist for Hodlneer Platinum (Origin) tier recognition
usage_notes: Match by full name only. Do not match on partial names or handles alone.
Entries with confidence=MEDIUM require manual admin confirmation before Platinum assignment.
Entries with confidence=EXCLUDE must not be used in automated matching logic.
Multiple year appearances increase confidence but do not change tier (Platinum is binary).
This whitelist is a seed, not a ceiling — Platinum may be assigned to qualifying individuals not listed here via admin review path.
Luca Schnetzler (2023) and Luca Netz (2024) may be the same person; treat both as MEDIUM until confirmed.
'Stark' (2018) requires first name confirmation before any backend use.

confidence_levels.HIGH: Name confirmed from multiple independent sources; no uncertainty flags
confidence_levels.MEDIUM: Single source confirmation or name partially uncertain; manual verification required
confidence_levels.EXCLUDE: Anonymous, pseudonymous, symbolic, or organizational entry; cannot be matched to onboarding identity

flags.ORG: Organization or group entry, not a single individual
flags.UNCERTAIN: Name partially confirmed; requires verification before backend use
flags.SYMBOLIC: Historical or symbolic inclusion; individual cannot be onboarded
flags.INCOMPLETE_YEAR: Year coverage below 50%; additional names likely exist

data_corrections_v1_1: Jerome Powell moved from 2020 to 2021 (he was on Forbes list in 2020, not CoinDesk)
Gavin Wood moved from 2020 to 2021 only (confirmed via 2020 Stocking Stuffers NFT portrait article)
Vitalik Buterin removed from 2021 (CoinDesk explicitly omitted him; noted publicly)
Mike Cascarilla corrected to Charles Cascarilla (Paxos CEO)
Nischal Uttarwar corrected to Amiti Uttarwar (Bitcoin Core developer)
Michael Shaulov corrected from Shahar Shaulov (Fireblocks CEO)
Alex Atallah (OpenSea) removed — not confirmed in 2021 list
Alex Juliano removed — not confirmed in any source
2019 coverage upgraded to 100% — all 10 names confirmed
2020 coverage upgraded to 100% — all 12 names confirmed
Donald Trump added to 2024 (appeared in both 2024 and 2025)
Barry Silbert confidence upgraded to HIGH (confirmed in 2021 and 2023)
